name: 08_mc_absent_return_above_stop_does_not_fire
description: Adversarial: a fix that fires too eagerly when MC is absent regardless of magnitude. When armed (fail-open) and MC absent but return is ABOVE the stop trigger level, the stop must NOT fire and the count must reset to 0.
derivation: armed=True, MC absent (prob_beating=None). Magnitude: 2.0 <= -1.0 - 0.10 = -1.10 -> FALSE. Condition fails -> count RESETS to 0. Hit = False. A fix that ignores magnitude when MC is absent and fires anyway MUST fail this test.
